understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate a grid-based puzzle to activate and step on goal cells to complete levels. Each goal cell requires my current piece to match its specific shape, color, and rotation. I must manage stamina and avoid running out of lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game uses a grid with walls. My piece has shape, color, and rotation attributes. Modifier tiles change these attributes: shape modifier cycles the shape, color modifier cycles the color, and rotation modifier rotates the piece 90° clockwise. To complete a goal, my piece must exactly match the goal's requirements in all three aspects simultaneously, then I step onto the goal cell. Movement costs stamina, and losing all stamina loses a life.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate a grid-based puzzle to activate and step on goal cells to complete levels. Each goal cell requires my current piece to match its specific shape, color, and rotation. I must manage stamina and avoid running out of lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game uses a grid with walls. My piece has shape, color, and rotation attributes. Modifier tiles change these attributes: shape modifier cycles the shape, color modifier cycles the color, and rotation modifier rotates the piece 90° clockwise. To complete a goal, my piece must exactly match the goal's requirements in all three aspects simultaneously, then I step onto the goal cell. Movement costs stamina, and losing all stamina loses a life.
